10612716.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
10612716.description: When a criminal on probation embarks on a killing spree of ex-lovers, police try to get ahead of the man who will later insist that he is a victim and that society is to blame.

10613608.title: Judge Judy
10613608.description: The ride home from a KISS concert turns violent when a man allegedly attacks his friend in the car. She sues for the assault and for damage to her vehicle.

10613690.title: Cheaters
10613690.description: Brenda's husband claims to work long hours - but his co-workers say otherwise. Raquel finds a phone number on a napkin in her boyfriend's pocket.

10614631.title: World's Most Evil Killers
10614631.description: Examining the life and crimes of Stephen Seddon, who killed his parents for a legacy.

10615593.title: Judge Judy
10615593.description: A former roommate is accused of punching a hole in a door. Then, an alleged assault during a basketball game.

10615680.title: Judge Judy
10615680.description: A man says his professional organizer falsified her hours and stole jewellery. Then, a new mother sues the baby's father for unpaid utility bills and emotional distress.

10616552.title: Judge Judy
10616552.description: Neighbours sue a 12-year-old's parents for damages after he hits their SUV with his bicycle. Then, a teen admits to breaking a car's windshield but says it was not his fault because another teen dared him to do it.

10616612.title: Something's Killing Me
10616612.description: Seven Chicago residents died under mysterious medical circumstances. Diagnoses included cardiac arrest, stroke and aneurism. However, a connection is made to all seven victims.

10617559.title: Operation Repo
10617559.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10617664.title: Operation Repo
10617664.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10618527.title: Judge Judy
10618527.description: The owner of a vacation home sues for damage to the property and a cancelled payment. Then, a woman says her former friend sold and gave away her belongings, including her dog.

10618612.title: Judge Judy
10618612.description: A teen says her mother stole money owed to her from her father's death benefit. Then, a teen's boyfriend refuses to repay a loan from her trust fund.

10618722.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
10618722.description: Team Salvage must save a stranded vessel stuck in a mangrove forest in North Queensland. The only solution is to hoist it out.

10619693.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10619693.description: Cecily makes good on a bond after she decides to take down the missing fugitive; Dog lets Cecily and Dakota lead a search.

10620658.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10620658.description: A family is trapped 50 metres up on a major tourist attraction on the South Coast, and a young rock climber disobeys his dad, with terrifying consequences.

10621707.title: Paranormal Survivor
10621707.description: The story of a woman who is followed by the evil spirit of a bootlegger. Felicia Sills finds a Civil War-era ring.

10622670.title: Judge Judy
10622670.description: A woman says she did not finish paying for a car because it was a lemon.

10623531.title: Judge Judy
10623531.description: A woman enlists a police sergeant to help her retrieve a security deposit.

10623598.title: Judge Judy
10623598.description: A woman sues her child's father for the return of her winnings from a slot machine.

10635492.description: Crystal Martin and her sister were terrorised for years by ghosts.
